zh.lifeSummary: 當Johan Henneke Moltke於大約1344年出生在德國時，他的父親Henrik Moltke29歲，母親Unknown16歲。他於大約1361年與Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1389年在瑞典維亞斯特格特藍德享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johan Henneke Moltke于大约1344年出生在德国时，他的父亲Henrik Moltke29岁，母亲Unknown16岁。他于大约1361年与Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1389年在瑞典維亞斯特格特藍德享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Johan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jöns
meanings: Older Scottish spelling of Joan , which was traditionally pronounced as two syllables.

variants.name: Jan
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: Jon
meanings: Simplified spelling of   John   or a short form of   Jonathan .  The name is borne by the Canadian singer  Jon Vickers  (  b. 1926 ) and the American actor  Jon Voight  (  b. 1938 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

nameMeanings.name: Henneke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Henke  .

variants.name: Hennecke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Gerhardt, Juergen.

historicEvents.description: Black Death killed one-third of population.

en.lifeSummary: When Johan Henneke Moltke was born about 1344, in Germany, his father, Henrik Moltke, was 29 and his mother, Unknown, was 16. He married Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein about 1361. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1389, in Västergötland, Sweden, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johan Henneke Moltke est né environ 1344, à Allemagne, son père, Henrik Moltke, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein environ 1361. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1389, à Västergötland, Suède, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johan Henneke Moltke um 1344 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henrik Moltke 29 und seine Mutter Unknown 16. Er hat um 1361 Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1389 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Västergötland, Schweden.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johan Henneke Moltke è nato il circa 1344 nel Germania, il suo padre, Henrik Moltke, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Unknown, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein circa 1361. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1389, nel Västergötland, Svezia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johan Henneke Moltkeが約1344年にドイツで生まれた時，父Henrik Moltkeは29歳，母Unknownは16歳であった。約1361年にMargarete Pedersdatter von Ebersteinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1389年にスウェーデンvaステルグoトランドで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johan Henneke Moltke(이)가 대략 1344년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henrik Moltke(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1361년 Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1389년 스웨덴 브a스터그o틀랜드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johan Henneke Moltke nasceu aproximadamente 1344, em Alemanha, seu pai, Henrik Moltke, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Unknown, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein aproximadamente 1361. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1389, em Västergötland, Suécia, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johan Henneke Moltke родился около 1344 г. в местности Германия, его отцу по имени Henrik Moltke было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Unknown, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein около 1361 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1389 г. в местности вaстиргoтланд, Швеция в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johan Henneke Moltke nació aproximadamente 1344, en Alemania, su papá, Henrik Moltke, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Unknown, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Margarete Pedersdatter von Eberstein aproximadamente 1361. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1389, en Västergötland, Suecia, a la edad de 46 años.
